TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Warren_Ajax, title = Warren_Ajax, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Warren_Ajax} }

S.FORM: Warren Ajax sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1921, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 5, Warren Ajax, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2004) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Warren Ajax sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1921, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 5, Warren Ajax, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2004) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: warren ajax s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, warren ajax, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
